steps.title: Set up the volume equation
steps.content:
The figure gives the volume formula
$$
V=\frac{7\pi k^3}{48}
$$
The glass can hold $473$ cubic centimeters, so
$$
\frac{7\pi k^3}{48}=473
$$

steps.title: Take the cube root
steps.content: Now take the cube root: $$ k=\sqrt[3]{1{,}032.6}=10.11 $$ The answer is D.
